lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Exchuse me... I am trying to tell my verrry good friends 'bout my uncle's bushy beard.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Exchuse me... I am lishning to my good friend.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: He could hardly climb a ladder without tripping.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Such a long beard it reached the floor!

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: The beard wasn't so clean after meals.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: His beard used to get into everyone's dinner.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: It was like a jungle on his chin!

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: In the summer he didn't need clothes.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: I mean, he needed to clean it more.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: He had the bushiest beard ever!

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: He was the hairiest dwarf in town.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: His wife could use it for a blanket.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Pearls of wisdom!

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Ah, tell it!

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Best times ever!

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Right you are.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Great days!

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: I'm going to be sick!

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: You're right.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: You're so right.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Those were the days!

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Not like nowadays.
